prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `817e6c09`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `817e6c09`. The rule is: treat each `2x2` yellow block as its own 4-connected object, sort the blocks left-to-right, and recolor every other block to `8` so the rightmost block is always `8`. I discarded the Opus hint because its parity claim was wrong, and there was no Sonnet hint entry. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `6/6` official examples passed, the shared builder produced `1000` generated examples, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 817e6c09` passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked a generated preview against the originals.
